---
title: "Solution 2C — Microbiome group CV and tuning"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

**Instructor notes:** Canonical answer uses **`group_vfold_cv(group = Individual)`** and **`decision_tree` + `rpart`** (Day 2 lecture). Store `Individual` in an id column, not as a predictor.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidymodels)
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})
```

```{r load-data}
set.seed(7)
source("_load_microbiome.R")
mic <- load_microbiome()
```

```{r split-group-cv}
split <- initial_split(mic, prop = 0.75, strata = Label)
train <- training(split)

rec <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = train) |>
  update_role(Individual, new_role = "id") |>
  step_mutate(across(all_numeric_predictors(), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

spec <- decision_tree(tree_depth = tune(), min_n = tune()) |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("classification")

wf <- workflow() |> add_recipe(rec) |> add_model(spec)

set.seed(7)
# strata omitted: same Individual can appear as Early and Late at different days
folds <- group_vfold_cv(train, group = Individual, v = 5)

grid <- expand.grid(tree_depth = c(2, 4, 6), min_n = c(5, 10, 20))
metrics_day2 <- metric_set(accuracy)

set.seed(7)
tune_res <- tune_grid(wf, resamples = folds, grid = grid, metrics = metrics_day2)
collect_metrics(tune_res) |> arrange(desc(mean))
```

```{r finalize}
best <- select_best(tune_res, metric = "accuracy")
best
final_wf <- finalize_workflow(wf, best)
final_fit <- last_fit(final_wf, split, metrics = metrics_day2)
collect_metrics(final_fit)
```

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
